commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 16:39 And Zadok the priest, and his brethren the priests, before the tabernacle of the LORD in the high place that was at Gibeon, Sadoc was to minister at Gabaon, with Heman, Idithun, while Abiathar, Asaph, officiated at Jerusalem. (Calmet) This regulation continued till towards the end of David's reign, (Haydock) when fresh orders were given, chap. We find Abiathar and Sadoc were both at Jerusalem, when David was obliged to flee, 2 Kings xv. , and 3 Kings i. The altar at Gabaon continued some time longer, 3 Kings iii.
